description:
Creative Double Question Mark Elegant White Desktop Lamp, USB Power Supply - Three Color Lighting, Suitable for Bedroom
1.【Minimalism Curve Design for Home】bedside lamp designed with "S" curve & trendy brushed metal finish, contemporary and minimalist, brings an artistic aesthetic for your room. Standing nearly 32cm tall and 10cm in diameter, this table lamp is ideal for living room, bedroom, office, study room, etc.
2.【3 Colour Mode Temperatures】Nightstand lamp designed with 3 Color Modes: Warm White, Soft White, and Daylight White (2700K, 4000K, 5000K). Different Modes creates a different atmosphere to meet your daily needs.
